title: ふとんがふっとんだ！with ロケットランチャー
description:
This is a shooting game where you blow away a futon with a rocket launcher.

The player set out on a journey with his partner Rocket Launcher to clean the Futon.

The goal is a cleaning spot 1km away. No matter what, don't drop the futon!

*"Futon ga Futtonda","Blow up the Futon" is a famous Japanese pun.

Game rules

1.Shoot the futon with the rocket launcher and it will fly away.

2.If you shoot the futon in the air, you can make it fly even further.

3.Repeat this to make the futon fly farther.

4.If you drop the futon on the ground, the game is over.

Game features

This game consists of multiple levels.

There is a story mode where you aim for the futon cleaning spot 1km away, and a challenge mode where you aim to fly the futon farther.

You have to pick up the rocket launcher ammo that is falling on the ground as you move along.

Enemies that appear along the way will attack the futon and try to make it fall to the ground, so use the rocket launcher to fight them off.

You can enjoy a moderate amount of thrill as you have to fight and collect ammunition while being careful not to drop the futon.

Rankings will be released after clearing the game. You can compete with players from all over the world to see how far the futon flies.
description_short: Blow away the futon with a rocket launcher! Fly it far, you win.
